detectors.description:
Reentrancy in THECRYPTS._transfer(address,address,uint256) (THECRYPTS.sol#439-501):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (THECRYPTS.sol#483)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (THECRYPTS.sol#515-527)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (THECRYPTS.sol#489)
		- _feeAddrWallet.transfer(amount) (THECRYPTS.sol#565)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (THECRYPTS.sol#499)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (THECRYPTS.sol#653)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (THECRYPTS.sol#633)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (THECRYPTS.sol#635)
	THECRYPTS._rOwned (THECRYPTS.sol#241) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- THECRYPTS._takeTeam(uint256) (THECRYPTS.sol#647-655)
	- THECRYPTS._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (THECRYPTS.sol#629-643)
	- THECRYPTS.balanceOf(address) (THECRYPTS.sol#357-361)
	- THECRYPTS.constructor() (THECRYPTS.sol#307-321)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (THECRYPTS.sol#499)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (THECRYPTS.sol#661)
	THECRYPTS._rTotal (THECRYPTS.sol#257) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- THECRYPTS._getCurrentSupply() (THECRYPTS.sol#753-763)
	- THECRYPTS._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (THECRYPTS.sol#659-665)
	- THECRYPTS.constructor() (THECRYPTS.sol#307-321)
	- THECRYPTS.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (THECRYPTS.sol#413-421)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in THECRYPTS.openTrading() (THECRYPTS.sol#571-597):
	External calls:
	- uniswapV2Pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),_uniswapV2Router.WETH()) (THECRYPTS.sol#581)
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (THECRYPTS.sol#583)
	External calls sending eth:
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (THECRYPTS.sol#583)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- tradingOpen = true (THECRYPTS.sol#593)
	THECRYPTS.tradingOpen (THECRYPTS.sol#281) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- THECRYPTS.openTrading() (THECRYPTS.sol#571-597)
